description: This customizable template can be used to educate your audience about World Art Day and promote celebratory events. All BEE templates are compatible with Mailchimp, Gmail, Sendgrid, Hubspot, and other email tools and platforms. Customize these templates in minutes by signing up for a free account.

designer.description: Hi, I'm Betina, a digital designer currently working across emails, digital campaigns and social media.
